info.name: Firefly Aerospace
info.description: Firefly Aerospace does not publish a public developer API. This Open Collection is an intentionally minimal placeholder maintained for catalog consistency. Firefly's offerings - Alpha and Eclipse launch, Blue Ghost lunar delivery, and Elytra/Ocula on-orbit services - are arranged through sales, the "Book A Ride" web inquiry workflow, and published Payload User's Guides, not through a programmatic API.

items.docs: Public marketing and product website. Firefly Aerospace exposes no public developer API; this request simply fetches the website homepage.
